$comment: Committed drift baselines (perf §9.5). PRs compare measured medians against these: warn > 10%, fail > driftFailPct (default 20). Each scenario's keys are `<FrameStats-lane>:<aggregate>` for 'frame' gates and `<metric>:min` for 'probe' gates (perf §9.6). Values are null until the PINNED CI runner (bench/run.mjs at 4x throttle, median-of-5) records them via `npm run bench:rebaseline`; this skeleton is the reviewed structure (perf §9.5: baselines updated only by a dedicated reviewed PR, never silently alongside a feature). The EXACT structural gates (aggregate `exact`, perf §4.4) and the design-intent smoke (S17, non-gating) carry no drift baseline — they are hard counts / reported-only, so they are intentionally absent here.

runner.note: Pin the exact Chromium + runner class in the CI workflow (perf §4.3 / doc 06).
